evidence: "I have enjoyed every season of Mozart in the Jungle Seasons. The music is wonderful and all the characters so enjoyable."
"Love this laid back series of a different time and a different way of life."
"It appeared chopped up and hard to follow."
"So many different and complex personalities of family members needed to be covered in more dept."
"I fell in love with Mrs. Palfrey & wish that her story had lasted longer..."
"The story line is both serious and entertaining..."
"The acting was brilliant and the story line thought provoking..."
"Martin Sheen did an amazing job portraying such an icon."
"Five stars alone just for the music!. Very interesting story lines."
"It should be watched for the music if nothing else. Outstanding..."
"Thought provoking, funny, & a look how some people respond...."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and historical narratives, particularly those with rich music elements. They appreciate high-quality production and emotional depth in storytelling, often favoring slower-paced, character-driven plots.
